text:
Market today: The market is showing some warning signs with a borrowing binge, but Jim Cramer still sees tech as the place for big winners. This is key for your concentrated tech/chip book.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL at -35% and SPAL is NEW at -34%. Both are leveraged ETFs and decay is a concern, especially on margin. QQQI is TRIM at -1.77%.

Watch: The scanner shows several long setups, particularly NOW (11/12 score) and ERX (10/12 score), indicating potential upside in specific tech/chip names if the market mood shifts.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and watching for clear signals in the broader tech/chip landscape.
plays: SOXL: Status is SELL. Given the -35% PnL and leveraged nature, consider reducing exposure or strictly adhering to your stop.
SPAL: Status is NEW and -34% PnL. This is a highly volatile leveraged ETF; monitor closely and be ready to cut losses if it moves against you.
No new buys today - hold and watch
